paragraphs: Connect talents, share innovation, and shape the future of wine together.
Le WineTech Tour Languedoc réunit les producteurs de vins du Languedoc et les entreprises innovantes de la filière lors d'une journée de speed meetings qualifiés.
Exchange, collaborate, and help build the future of wine.
La WineTech connects wine innovation talents across the world. A unique community to share, learn, collaborate.
